headline: Adobe (ADBE) Price Target Cut as TD Cowen Flags Slowing Spend and Weak AI Credit Demand
summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) is one of the best tech stocks to invest in on the dip. On June 8, TD Cowen analyst Derrick Wood lowered his price target on Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) from $310 to $285 while keeping a Hold rating on the stock. Wood said the cut was supported by a set of mixed […]

headline: Microsoft vs. Adobe: Which High ROIC Software Stock is the Best Buy-the-Dip Target?

headline: Comparably Announces 2026 Best Career Growth, Best Leadership Teams, and Best Departments Awards
summary: VANCOUVER, Wash., June 16, 2026--Comparably, a ZoomInfo company and employee review platform for workplace culture and compensation, announced the winners of its 2026 Best Career Growth, Best Leadership Teams and Best Departments awards, recognizing top-rated companies across Sales, Marketing, HR, Product and Design, and Engineering.

headline: Adobe & LinkedIn Launch Global AI Skills Initiative for Marketing Professionals
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., June 16, 2026--Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE) — the global technology leader that unleashes creativity, productivity and customer experiences through innovative tools and platforms — and LinkedIn — the world’s largest professional networking platform — today announced AI Essentials for Marketers, a joint global initiative designed to help marketing professionals develop the AI skills that matter most to their roles, so they can be equipped to lead their organizations in the AI era. headline: Adobe (ADBE) Urges White House To Lift Anthropic AI Export Curbs
summary: Adobe's cybersecurity leadership has joined other U.S. tech companies in an open letter urging the White House to lift export restrictions on Anthropic's AI models. The signatories argue that current AI export curbs could weaken national security by limiting access to tools used to detect and counter software vulnerabilities. This public stance marks a fresh chapter in Adobe's involvement in U.S. tech and security policy beyond earnings updates or product launches. For investors watching...
